description_en: Dar es Salaam may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 16 halal restaurants and 150 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Dar es Salaam, Tanzania, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Dar es Salaam: 26 halal restaurants listed, 150 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.2/5.
